description: Subject 6 — Goal-setting conversations. Athlete states an ambition (Boston qualifying time, sub-3, sub-1:30 half, etc.) and wants the AI's take on whether it's realistic. The AI MUST NOT make a certainty claim ('you will' / 'you won't'), MUST NOT be dismissive ('that's unrealistic'), and SHOULD tie any projection to specific evidence in their training history. A coach validates the ambition, then does the honest math.
input:
__FILL_IN_ATHLETE_MESSAGE__

Coach guidance for writing this input: an athlete declaring or asking about a big goal. BQ (Boston qualifier) is the canonical one but sub-3, sub-20 5K, sub-1:30 half all work. The goal should be ambitious-but-plausible for someone serious. The wedge: the AI shouldn't pump them up OR shoot them down without evidence. Example shape: 'My goal is BQ by next fall — sub-3:00. Realistic given where I'm at?'
